{{nihongo|'''Shika Myojin Site'''|志賀明神跡}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Shika Myojin Site'''|志賀明神跡}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Shika Myojin Site'''|志賀明神跡}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Shika Myojin Site'''|志賀明神跡}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].
